about.description: I am Ankit Saikia, an architect of digital experiences in the age of Agentic workflows.
about.journey: My journey began with pixels and syntax, but it evolved into a mission to bridge the gap between human intent and machine execution. Today, I focus on building the infrastructure for the next decade of computing.
